post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 251


It was a NormalTM day at UnpaidInternCentralTM – BossTM was recovering from a severe case of SenioritisTM, mathjayTM was ProcrastinatingTM on MajorLifeDecisionsTM, HannahWTM was taking SquirrelPicturesTM, and MathletesvTM was HatingTM on Made_in_2004 (whose name is not TrademarkedTM and is open for public use) – everything was perfectly NormalTM.

Suddenly, the NormalityTM of the day is broken when mathjayTM bursts into the office of BossTM himself, triumphantly holding up what appears to be a stick of ButterTM.

“BOSSTM, YOU HAVE TO TRY THIS!” mathjayTM exclaims, “IT’S SO GOODTM!!!1!1!!1!”

“A stick of ButterTM?” asks BossTM skeptically, “Also, have you FinishedTM that ReportTM I told you to do two years ago?”

“Absolutely not, sir!” mathjayTM replied seriously. “What do you think I am, a CompetentEmployeeTM? But anyway, try this ButterTM!”

“How am I going to try it without anything to eat it w- MFFFFFFFFFFFFFTAJ!$LKSJ!@#!FDA!$AJFKL:DJSITU!#$DSL::SDF!@JKS)($!124!@+I51UO!!?!?!”

Without warning, mathjayTM shoves the entire stick of ButterTM in BossTM’s mouth.

“Please teach me how to speak KeysmashTM,” mathjayTM says, “Also, have some ManchildPancakesTM that were supposed to be ChocolateCookiesTM but FailedTM. I put 12938795371892312 sticks of ButterTM into them for the maximum AuthenticAmericanExperienceTM!”

mathjayTM casually pulls out a whole plate of ManchildPancakesTM from his backpack and throws them all in BossTM’s face. BossTM turns an interesting shade of blue, then purple, to green, then to red, all in the span of a few minutes. MathjayTM looks on curiously as BossTM is choking on the stick of ButterTM and the plate of ManchildPancakesTM.

A visit to the EmergencyRoomTM later…

“That ButterTM was pretty GoodTM, wasn’t it?” asks mathjayTM.

“...”

“Yes, I’m glad you AgreeTM, because that was the MostExpensiveTM ButterTM in the WorldTM!”

“Wait, what?”

“In fact, I used up all of UnpaidDollarsTM in the UnpaidInternCentralTM VaultTM to buy 832975091357840 pounds of it!”

“WHAT!”

“Now, now, don’t get so EmotionalTM,” replies mathjayTM as he pats BossTM on the shoulder, “It’s what FriendsTM do for each other.”

At least he didn’t use the EmergencyFundsTM from my PrivateVaultTM, BossTM thinks as he sighs, The savings for my next VacationTM to NowhereTM are safe.

“Also I needed approximately 293847123 million more UnpaidDollarsTM for the TransactionTM so I broke into your PrivateVaultTM as well! I knew you wouldn’t mind because you’re such a GenerousTM BossTM.”

“Bu- B- But- B- But-” stutters BossTM as his jaw drops to the floor.

“Now, now, close your mouth, you’re gonna catch PaidInternCentralTM’s DirtyDingusFliesTM,” says mathjay with great gusto, “I know it was an AbsoluteStealTM, no need to remind me how much of a GeniosityTM I am.”

“WE NEED TO MAKE THAT MONEY BACK NOW OR WE’RE GOING OutOfBusinessTM!!!1!1!!1!” BossTM exclaims as he shakes mathjayTM back and forth. “QUICK, RAID THE VaultOfGrandHarebrainedSchemesTM!1!!!1!1!11!!1!!!”

In the VaultOfGrandHarebrainedSchemesTM…

“Hmm, there’s one here that says ‘Buy a FishTM and slap BossTM with it’,” suggests mathjayTM, holding up a piece of paper, “That sounds like a GreatIdeaTM!”

“No, you idiot,” replies BossTM as he pulls out a live SardineTM from his pocket and chucks it at mathjayTM, “We need to make money, FastTM!”

“How about this one: ‘Start paying your UnpaidInternsTM.’”

“PAYING MY UnpaidInternsTM? THAT WOULD MAKE THEM PaidInternsTM! I’M NOT ABOUT TO SELL MY COMPANY TO PaidInternCentralTM! GET THAT OUT OF HERE!” BossTM yells, “There’s gotta be a good one somewhere. Hmm… ‘Start PayingAttentionTM in class.’ WHAT THE- WHAT KIND OF HarebrainedSchemeTM IS THIS?”

“Ooooh! This one’s good! We need to ‘Invite the PromotionAngelTM and the FiringDevilTM to get rid of the BotSaboteursTM’, OF COURSE! Why didn’t I think of that?”

“That would have been a GreatIdeaTM but we already used that last year for ReaperWarsTM! DO YOU HAVE SHORT-TERM MEMORY LOSS?”

“Oh yeah! Wait, didn’t I get FiredTM during ReaperWarsTM? Why do I still work here?”

“Hmph. I RehiredTM you because I couldn’t find anyone else willing to WorkForFreeTM. Hey, this one’s good: ‘Buy something, slap the UnpaidInternCentralTM logo on it, then sell it for 2194710297059138503918401 times the original price’!”

A sudden rumbling sound from above interrupts the conversation.

“What’s that sound?” asks BossTM.

“Oh, sorry, that’s my stomach, I’m a bit HungryTM,” explains mathjayTM.

“But didn’t you just buy 832975091357840 pounds of ButterTM?”

“I couldn’t eat that much!” replies mathjayTM, “Do I look fat to you?”

“Um, no?”

“I put the rest in the ButterVaultTM, three floors above this vault. It was a tight fit since the ButterVaultTM was only supposed to store 1 pound of ButterTM, but I managed to make it work.”

“Oh my gosh, why me?” asks BossTM as he stares up at the ceiling.

Suddenly, the ceiling collapses and the entire vault is drenched in molten ButterTM.

- Important Rules -
This tab summarizes the most important rules for easy reference.

For experienced players: everything you need is here, and in the setup tab.
For new players: you may find it useful to familiarize yourself with the rest of the rules.

Integrity
  • Do not edit or delete your posts, even for typos. Just post again.
  • Do not OOT (Out of Thread) and talk about this game outside this thread, your role PM, or approved private chats, even if you are dead. Access to spectator chats will be granted upon request.
  • Do not gamethrow or intentionally sabotage your wincondition.
  • Do not attach files or link to external documents concerning this game. Discussions must stay in this thread.
  • Do not use OGI (Out of Game Information). Publicly discussed reads should be made exclusively from information in this thread or past completed games.

Activity
  • Each "Day" is 3 days while each "Night" is 1 day.
  • Do not post during night.
  • This game uses Dawn start: Day 1 will not start until everyone shows that they have read the rules by completing the confirm task.
  • All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable.
  • Activity rules are 24 hours to first PM prod, 48 hours to second PM prod, and 72 hours to replacement status.

Voting
  • You must format your votes correctly. Capitalization doesn't matter, and capital i/lowercase L are not differentiated.
  • Both bold vote and code vote formats are accepted, although bold is preferred. Refer to the Voting tab if you do not know what these are.
  • Majority hang is off for Day 1, but it is on starting Day 2.
  • Deadline hang is on from Day 1 but it is off for LYLO.
  • Votes are locked at LYLO.

Etiquette and Warnings
  • Use common sense, such as confirming by making a post in the thread praising ButterTM.
  • Do not use formatting that makes text hard to read.
  • You may attack a player’s opinion, but do not make personal attacks on players themselves.
  • Disagreements should be resolved in a way that does not affect gameplay.
  • Do not discuss rule violations by other players in the thread; contact the moderators privately.
  • First-timers can receive up to 3 warnings before their next offense results in a force replacement or modkill. All other players can receive up to 2.
  • Players may be replaced at the moderators' discretion for procedural difficulties.
  • All other rules are standard.

Setup and Moderators
  • This game is based on the 7-2 Mountainous setup.
  • Mafia have access to daychat.
  • All role mechanics and Night Action Resolutions are standard.
  • This game is moderated by Socoobo and kevinmathz.
  • This game operates optional discord spectator and mafia private chats using the Unpaid Intern Central server. Contacts the mods to request access.

Resources and Support
  • For any issues, you may contacts us through your role PM or through Discord (s0c00b0#5989).
  • For a list of basic resources, refer to the Resources tab below.
  • For a more extensive list of resources compiled by the UIMT, go here.
  • If this game is causing you significant stress or frustration, feel free to use your role PM to talk or vent. We may not be allowed to give you technical advice, but we can listen or help you find a better way to process events. You may also contact us via Discord if you prefer.

  • General
    Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas, among others, as well as the Mafia Universe forum rules, for the rule template.

    The following are standard mafia game rules.

    • Do not post during the night phase.
    • Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderators. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
    • If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate; access to spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered.
    • Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent].
    • Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as appropriate.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
    • Do not impersonate the mods.
    • Do not lie to the mods.
    • Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.

  • Votes and Hangs
    This tab covers voting, unvoting, No Hangs, and hangs.

    • Votes must be in this format to be counted: Vote: [player username].
    • By default, votes should be made in [b] (bold) tags. However, votes made in [code] and [c] tags will also be accepted.
    • Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized, correctly. Do not use nicknames.
    • For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical.
    • For example, both Vote: mathjay and Vote: mAtHjAy are valid votes, but vote: mathjay, Vote: jay, Vote: mathjay., Vote:mathjay, Vote: mathjay, and Vote: mathjay are invalid.
    • Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is similarly formatted, even with separate tags, are invalid.
    • Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
    • Vote to hang no one by posting Vote: No Hang.
    • Unvote by posting Unvote. You do not have to unvote before voting again.
    • Votecounts will be posted periodically. Players may request a new VC in bold or in their role PM.
    • Invalid votes will not count under any circumstances. Consider notifying the mods in your role PM if you want to purposely fakevote.
    • Valid votes will always be counted unless they are clearly unintentional. There is no guarantee that an accidental vote will not be counted.
    • Votes will be carried over if a player is replaced.
    • The Not Voting section should be ignored if it contradicts another part of the votecount (VC).
    • If an error in the votecount is not pointed out within 2 days or by the next EOD, whichever is sooner, the incorrect VC will become official.
    • This game uses deadline hang: the player with the most votes at the EOD (End of Day) deadline will be hanged.
    • If two or more players have the same number of votes at the EOD deadline, the player who reached that number of votes first will be hanged. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • If no votes have been cast by the deadline, no one will be hanged.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur.
    • Upon reaching LYLO (Hang-or-Lose), votes will be locked, meaning that they cannot be changed.
    • Deadline hang is off at LYLO. If a majority hang is not reached by the deadline, the day will end without a hang, resulting in an automatic win for the mafia team.
    • The moment the deadline occurs, no further votes will be counted. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • If the deadline has passed or a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
    • Once the moderators declare the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.
  • Activity
    This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.

    • All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
    • Each day phase will be 72 hours (3 days), and each night phase will be 24 hours (1 day).
    • The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
    • The current deadline can be found in the bottom of the OP (Original Post, or post #1).
    • If a player with an NA (Night Action) anticipates being unavailable during the night phase, they may submit any night actions to be performed in advance.
    • If a player with an NA has not submitted their action by 12 hours before the night deadline, a reminder will be sent.
    • If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from a player by the night deadline, the player will not perform an action that night.
    • Night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night (EON). You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates if they miss a deadline.
    • Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in bold in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded.
    • V/LAs should be shorter than one week. For longer absences, contact the moderators for options.
    • Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting Request Replacement in-thread or in their role PM.
    • Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in.
    • Players will receive their first PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 24 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
    • Players will receive their second PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA.
    • Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
    • If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
    • If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
    • Activity Checks (ACs) will be posted periodically. Players may request a new AC in bold or in their role PM.
    • Activity will reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart.
    • If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
    • If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.
  • Integrity and Etiquette
    This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.

    • Do not gamethrow.
    • Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, or other interactions with moderators.
    • Do not discuss rule violations, especially violations by other players in the thread. If you wish, contact the moderators privately through your role PM or Discord.
    • Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive player-to-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
    • Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably consider alignment indicative.

    The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, click here.

    • Do not make personal attacks. You may attack a player's opinion, but do not demean the player themselves.
    • Do not spam.
    • Follow AoPS Community Guidelines and the AoPS Terms of Service.
    • Be mature and use common sense.
    • Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
      Causing significant disruptions to gameplay may result in a force replacement at the moderators' discretion.
    • For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. A player may receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.

    The above rules broadly address most etiquette issues. For specific details and examples of improper behavior, click here.

  • - Moderation Policies -
  • Moderator Information
    This tab provides technical information about this game.

    • Socoobo and kevinmathz are the moderators of Mafia Game 251.
    • HannahW, Mathletesv, ad333, Scipio1, Nike100, and mathjay have contributed to flavor, setup, OCRSTM, feedback, and management of the private chat discord system.
    • This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access as appropriate.
    • Red text is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
    • Blue text is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderators.
    • Green text is used for town flavor-related text.
    • Purple text is used for third-party flavor-related text.
    • Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes.
    • Current custom shades are: Town flavor green v.2 (#2be368) and Activity Check blue (#005dff). For a full list of custom colors, click here.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time. Major rule changes will be announced at the bottom of the OP. All changes will also be noted in the modlog and OCRSTM Version History.
    • Players will not be retroactively penalized for violating new rules.
    • Major changes to the OP may be made in between games. The most important changes will be noted in the OCRSTM Version History.
    • The moderators pledge to treat players fairly and keep moderator interventions to a minimum; however, we reserve the right to make the final judgement in the moderation of this game.

    MG251 OP is based on Overcomplicated RulesetTM (OCRSTM) 10.
    Current version: 10.0.1
    Version History

    OCRSTM 10 is available for public use. If you are interested in using OCRSTM in your own games, click here.
Setup
The setup is 7-2 Mountainous. No fancy PRs, no random mechanics, no Magic8BallsTM, no MicrowavablePotatoesTM, just 7 Vanilla Townies and 2 Mafia Goons. Oh yeah, and lots of GreatFlavorTM provided by BossTM, as always.

Role PMs
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Hello, [name]! You are a ButterInternTM (Vanilla Townie).

You were scammed into taking this job along with eight others by UnpaidInternCentralTM’s classic slogan, “This job will make you RichTM!” Moreover, being the GullibleIdiotTM that you are, you unwittingly signed nine UnpaidContractsTM that bound you to the position until you either die, or worse, get FiredTM by BossTM.

After a few days of back-breaking, skull-piercing, cruel-and-unusual, UnpaidTM labor, you discover that two of the ButterInternsTM have gone OnStrikeTM! SocooboTM, always a fair and democratic BossTM who welcomes DifferentOpinionsTM, locks down the entire ButterFactoryTM and leaves the nine of you to find and FireTM the ButterStrikersTM.

You have no special abilities; your power lies in your observational skills, your voice, and your vote. You win when all of the ButterStrikersTM (Mafia Goons) have been FiredTM.

Good luck!
Mafia Goon wrote:
Hello, [name]! You are a ButterStrikerTM (Mafia Goon).

You were scammed into taking this job along with eight others by UnpaidInternCentralTM’s classic slogan, “This job will make you RichTM!” Moreover, being the GullibleIdiotTM that you are, you unwittingly signed nine UnpaidContractsTM that bound you to the position until you either die, or worse, get FiredTM by BossTM.

After a few days of back-breaking, skull-piercing, cruel-and-unusual, UnpaidTM labor, you decide to partner up with another ButterInternTM and go OnStrikeTM to expose the horrible working conditions at UnpaidInternCentralTM. To do this successfully, you need to stay undercover, gathering sufficient evidence to build up your case.

Your partner is [name]. You may talk to them privately in the Discord server here at any time. Each night, you and your partner may choose to ForgeTM a TerminationLetterTM from BossTM and FireTM an innocent ButterInternTM from the ButterFactoryTM. You win when all ButterInternsTM are FiredTM, or when it is mechanically impossible to prevent this outcome.

Good luck!

“WE NEED TO MAKE THAT MONEY BACK NOW OR WE’RE GOING OutOfBusiness[sup]TM[/sup]!!!1!1!!1!” Boss[sup]TM[/sup] exclaims as he shakes mathjay[sup]TM[/sup] back and forth. “QUICK, RAID THE VaultOfGrandHarebrainedSchemes[sup]TM[/sup]!1!!!1!1!11!!1!!!”

[i]In the VaultOfGrandHarebrainedSchemes[sup]TM[/sup]…[/i]

“Hmm, there’s one here that says ‘Buy a Fish[sup]TM[/sup] and slap Boss[sup]TM[/sup] with it’,” suggests mathjay[sup]TM[/sup], holding up a piece of paper, “That sounds like a GreatIdea[sup]TM[/sup]!”

“No, you idiot,” replies Boss[sup]TM[/sup] as he pulls out a live Sardine[sup]TM[/sup] from his pocket and chucks it at mathjay[sup]TM[/sup], “We need to make money, Fast[sup]TM[/sup]!”

“How about this one: ‘Start paying your UnpaidInterns[sup]TM[/sup].’”

“PAYING MY [i]Unpaid[/i]Interns[sup]TM[/sup]? THAT WOULD MAKE THEM [i]Paid[/i]Interns[sup]TM[/sup]! I’M NOT ABOUT TO SELL MY COMPANY TO PaidInternCentral[sup]TM[/sup]! GET THAT OUT OF HERE!” Boss[sup]TM[/sup] yells, “There’s gotta be a good one somewhere. Hmm… ‘Start PayingAttention[sup]TM[/sup] in class.’ WHAT THE- WHAT KIND OF HarebrainedScheme[sup]TM[/sup] IS THIS?”

“Ooooh! This one’s good! We need to ‘Invite the PromotionAngel[sup]TM[/sup] and the FiringDevil[sup]TM[/sup] to get rid of the BotSaboteurs[sup]TM[/sup]’, OF COURSE! Why didn’t I think of that?”

“That would have been a GreatIdea[sup]TM[/sup] but we already used that last year for ReaperWars[sup]TM[/sup]! DO YOU HAVE SHORT-TERM MEMORY LOSS?”

“Oh yeah! Wait, didn’t I get Fired[sup]TM[/sup] during ReaperWars[sup]TM[/sup]? Why do I still work here?”

“Hmph. I Rehired[sup]TM[/sup] you because I couldn’t find anyone else willing to WorkForFree[sup]TM[/sup]. Hey, this one’s good: ‘Buy something, slap the UnpaidInternCentral[sup]TM[/sup] logo on it, then sell it for 2194710297059138503918401 times the original price’!”

A sudden rumbling sound from above interrupts the conversation.

“What’s that sound?” asks Boss[sup]TM[/sup].

“Oh, sorry, that’s my stomach, I’m a bit Hungry[sup]TM[/sup],” explains mathjay[sup]TM[/sup].

“But didn’t you just buy 832975091357840 pounds of Butter[sup]TM[/sup]?”

“I couldn’t eat that much!” replies mathjay[sup]TM[/sup], “Do I look fat to you?”

“Um, no?”

“I put the rest in the ButterVault[sup]TM[/sup], three floors above this vault. It was a tight fit since the ButterVault[sup]TM[/sup] was only supposed to store 1 pound of Butter[sup]TM[/sup], but I managed to make it work.” 

“Oh my gosh, why me?” asks Boss[sup]TM[/sup] as he stares up at the ceiling.

Suddenly, the ceiling collapses and the entire vault is drenched in molten Butter[sup]TM[/sup].

[hide=- Important Rules -]
[b]This tab summarizes the most important rules for easy reference.[/b]

[b]For experienced players:[/b] everything you need is here, and in the setup tab. 
[b]For new players:[/b] you may find it useful to familiarize yourself with the rest of the rules. 

[b]Integrity[/b]
[list][*][b]Do not edit or delete[/b] your posts, even for typos. Just post again. 
[*][b]Do not OOT (Out of Thread)[/b] and talk about this game outside this thread, your role PM, or approved private chats, even if you are dead. Access to spectator chats will be granted upon request. 
[*][b]Do not gamethrow[/b] or intentionally sabotage your wincondition. 
[*][b]Do not attach files[/b] or link to external documents concerning this game. Discussions must stay in this thread.
[*][b]Do not use OGI (Out of Game Information).[/b] Publicly discussed reads should be made exclusively from information in this thread or past completed games.[/list]

[b]Activity[/b]
[list][*]Each [b]"Day" is 3 days[/b] while each [b]"Night" is 1 day[/b].
[*][b]Do not post during night.[/b]
[*]This game uses [b]Dawn start[/b]: Day 1 will not start until everyone shows that they have read the rules by completing the confirm task. 
[*]All [b]times will be in Eastern Standard Time[/b] (EST, UTC-5) or [b]Eastern Daylight Time[/b] (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable. 
[*]Activity rules are [b]24 hours[/b] to first PM prod, [b]48 hours[/b] to second PM prod, and [b]72 hours to replacement status[/b].[/list]

[b]Voting[/b]
[list][*]You [b]must format your votes correctly[/b]. Capitalization doesn't matter, and capital i/lowercase L are not differentiated. 
[*]Both [b]bold vote[/b] and [b]code vote[/b] formats are accepted, although bold is preferred. Refer to the Voting tab if you do not know what these are. 
[*][b]Majority hang is off[/b] for Day 1, but it is [b]on[/b] starting Day 2.
[*][b]Deadline hang is on[/b] from Day 1 but it is [b]off[/b] for LYLO. 
[*][b]Votes are locked at LYLO.[/b][/list]

[b]Etiquette and Warnings[/b]

[list][*][b]Use common sense, such as confirming by making a post in the thread praising Butter[sup]TM[/sup].[/b] 
[*]Do not use formatting that makes text [b]hard to read[/b].
[*]You may attack a player’s opinion, but [b]do not make personal attacks[/b] on players themselves. 
[*]Disagreements should be resolved in a way that [b]does not affect gameplay[/b]. 
[*][b]Do not discuss rule violations by other players[/b] in the thread; contact the moderators privately. 
[*]First-timers can receive up to [b]3 warnings[/b] before their next offense results in a force replacement or modkill. [b]All other players can receive up to 2.[/b]
[*]Players may be replaced at the moderators' discretion for procedural difficulties. 
[*][b]All other rules are standard.[/b][/list] 

[b]Setup and Moderators[/b]

[list][*]This game is based on the [b]7-2 Mountainous setup[/b].
[*]Mafia have access to [b]daychat[/b]. 
[*]All role mechanics and Night Action Resolutions are [b]standard[/b].
[*]This game is moderated by Socoobo and kevinmathz. 
[*]This game operates optional discord spectator and mafia private chats using the Unpaid Intern Central server. Contacts the mods to request access.[/list]

[b]Resources and Support[/b]

[list][*]For any issues, you may contacts us through your role PM or through Discord (s0c00b0#5989). 
[*]For a list of basic resources, refer to the Resources tab below.
[*]For a more extensive list of resources compiled by the UIMT, go [url=aops.com/community/h2517106]here[/url].
[*]If this game is causing you significant stress or frustration, feel free to use your role PM to talk or vent. We may not be allowed to give you technical advice, but we can listen or help you find a better way to process events. You may also contact us via Discord if you prefer.[/list][/hide]

[list][*][hide=General]
[i]Credits to [url=http://bit.ly/fbith]Binomial-theorem[/url], [url=http://bit.ly/rmchao]chaotic_iak[/url], [url=http://bit.ly/rmww123]willwang123[/url], and [url=http://bit.ly/ffdas]fdas[/url], among others, as well as the [url=http://bit.ly/MUnFR]Mafia Universe forum rules[/url], for the rule template.[/i]

[b]The following are standard mafia game rules.[/b]


[list][*]Do not post during the night phase.
[*]Do not talk about this game's events outside of this thread unless you are specifically given permission to do so by the moderators. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread. Referring to anything that has happened in an ongoing game, even if you do not say which game it is, is OOT.
[*]If you are dead, do not post, and do not talk about this game anywhere else. You may still spectate; access to spoiled and unspoiled spectator chats will be offered. 
[*]Do not use any formatting that obscures or conceals text. This includes [verbatim][color=#FFFFFF], [color=white], and [color=transparent][/verbatim]. 
[*]Do not edit or delete posts, even for typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as appropriate. 
[*]Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
[*]Do not impersonate the mods. 
[*]Do not lie to the mods. 
[*]Do not abuse loopholes in the rules. Intent will be considered during rule enforcement. 
[*]You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications.[/list][/hide]

[*][hide=Votes and Hangs]
[b]This tab covers voting, unvoting, No Hangs, and hangs.[/b]


[list][*]Votes must be in this format to be counted: [b]Vote: [player username][/b].
[*]By default, votes should be made in [verbatim][b] (bold) tags. However, votes made in [code] and [c] tags will also be accepted.[/verbatim]
[*]Usernames in votes must be spelled, but not necessarily capitalized, correctly. Do not use nicknames. 
[*]For the purposes of voting, I (capital i) and l (lowercase L) are considered identical. 
[*]For example, both [b]Vote: mathjay[/b] and [b]Vote: mAtHjAy[/b] are valid votes, but [b]vote: mathjay[/b], [b]Vote: jay[/b], [b]Vote: mathjay.[/b], [b]Vote:mathjay[/b], Vote: [b]mathjay[/b], and [b][i]Vote: mathjay[/i][/b] are invalid. 
[*]Votes followed by extraneous punctuation that is similarly formatted, even with separate tags, are invalid. 
[*]Votes in hide, tip, or quote tags do not count.
[*]Vote to hang no one by posting [b]Vote: No Hang[/b].
[*]Unvote by posting [b]Unvote[/b]. You do not have to unvote before voting again. 
[*]Votecounts will be posted periodically. Players may request a new VC in bold or in their role PM. 
[*]Invalid votes will not count under any circumstances. Consider notifying the mods in your role PM if you want to purposely fakevote.
[*]Valid votes will always be counted unless they are clearly unintentional. There is no guarantee that an accidental vote will not be counted.
[*]Votes will be carried over if a player is replaced. 
[*]The Not Voting section should be ignored if it contradicts another part of the votecount (VC). 
[*]If an error in the votecount is not pointed out within 2 days or by the next EOD, whichever is sooner, the incorrect VC will become official.
[*]This game uses deadline hang: the player with the most votes at the EOD (End of Day) deadline will be hanged.
[*]If two or more players have the same number of votes at the EOD deadline, the player who reached that number of votes first will be hanged. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]If no votes have been cast by the deadline, no one will be hanged. 
[*]Starting Day 2, if a player is voted by the majority of living players, then that player will be hanged immediately; and if No Hang is voted by half of living players, a No Hang will occur.
[*]Upon reaching LYLO (Hang-or-Lose), votes will be locked, meaning that they cannot be changed.
[*]Deadline hang is off at LYLO. If a majority hang is not reached by the deadline, the day will end without a hang, resulting in an automatic win for the mafia team. 
[*]The moment the deadline occurs, no further votes will be counted. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab. 
[*]If the deadline has passed or a hammer has occurred and the EOD has not been declared, the game will proceed into twilight. Players may still post, but no more votes or unvotes will be counted.
[*]Once the moderators declare the EOD, the person hanged will be officially eliminated and their role revealed. Night will then immediately begin.[/list][/hide]
[*][hide=Activity]
[b]This tab covers deadlines, activity rules, V/LAs, and replacements.[/b]


[list][*]All times will be in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) or Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) as applicable, unless otherwise noted.
[*]Each day phase will be 72 hours (3 days), and each night phase will be 24 hours (1 day). 
[*]The moderators may extend deadlines at their discretion.
[*]The current deadline can be found in the bottom of the OP (Original Post, or post #1). 
[*]If a player with an NA (Night Action) anticipates being unavailable during the night phase, they may submit any night actions to be performed in advance. 
[*]If a player with an NA has not submitted their action by 12 hours before the night deadline, a reminder will be sent. 
[*]If the moderators do not receive an NA submission from a player by the night deadline, the player will not perform an action that night.
[*]Night results will be sent after the night deadline.
[*]Night will end when the moderators make a post declaring the end of night (EON). You may not post in the thread until then, even if the night deadline has passed. Instead, PM the mods for updates if they miss a deadline. 
[*]Players who are temporarily unable to fulfill activity requirements can declare a V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence) by posting the V/LA dates in [b]bold[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. Players on a V/LA will not be prodded. 
[*]V/LAs should be shorter than one week. For longer absences, contact the moderators for options. 
[*]Players who no longer wish to or are unable to play in this game can request replacement by posting [b]Request Replacement[/b] in-thread or in their role PM. 
[*]Players who have replaced out generally will not be allowed to replace back in. 
[*]Players will receive their first PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 24 hours and are not on V/LA. Details on "game-advancing post" are in the Moderation Policies tab.
[*]Players will receive their second PM prod if they have not made a game-advancing post for 48 hours and are not on V/LA. 
[*]Players will be replaced if they have not made a game-advancing post for 72 hours and are not on V/LA, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement. 
[*]If a player receives 4 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
[*]If a player reaches replacement status more than once, they will be replaced.
[*]Activity Checks (ACs) will be posted periodically. Players may request a new AC in bold or in their role PM. 
[*]Activity will reset overnight. Players will not receive prods between twilight and daystart. 
[*]If you have access to a private topic, you may request that a partner be poked. The moderators will send a notification via PM to the specified player, but this will not count as an official prod.
[*]If a player is postbanned by the AoPS Sheriff, they will be replaced. Details are in the Moderation Policies tab.[list][/hide]
[*][hide=Integrity and Etiquette]
[b]This tab covers integrity recommendations, player etiquette, warning limits, and examples of inconsiderate gameplay.[/b]


[list][*]Do not gamethrow. 
[*]Do not discuss player alignments based on V/LAs, replacements, warnings, force replacements, modkills, or other interactions with moderators. 
[*]Do not discuss rule violations, especially violations by other players in the thread. If you wish, contact the moderators privately through your role PM or Discord. 
[*]Any significant, game-related, and intentionally exclusive player-to-player communication outside of moderator-sanctioned channels is prohibited.
[*]Do not publicly reference OGI (Out of Game Information) in reads or create situations outside the thread that players could reasonably consider alignment indicative.[/list]

The above rules are attempts to preserve the spirit of the game and should not affect most players. For specific details and examples, [url=https://aops.com/community/p24617334]click here[/url]. 


[list][*]Do not make personal attacks. You may attack a player's opinion, but do not demean the player themselves. 
[*]Do not spam.
[*]Follow AoPS Community Guidelines and the AoPS Terms of Service.
[*]Be mature and use common sense.
[*]Behavior that disrupts the game for players and makes it unreasonably hard for them to read and play may result in a warning.
[b]Causing significant disruptions to gameplay may result in a force replacement at the moderators' discretion. 
[*]For minor rule infractions, first-timers can receive up to three warnings, while all other players can receive up to two. A player may receive multiple warnings for a single infraction.[/list]

The above rules broadly address most etiquette issues. For specific details and examples of improper behavior, [url=https://aops.com/community/p24617342]click here[/url].[/hide]

[*][b][url=https://aops.com/community/p24617357]- Moderation Policies -[/url][/b]

[*][hide=Moderator Information]
[b]This tab provides technical information about this game.[/b]


[list][*]Socoobo and kevinmathz are the moderators of Mafia Game 251. 
[*]HannahW, Mathletesv, ad333, Scipio1, Nike100, and mathjay have contributed to flavor, setup, OCRSTM, feedback, and management of the private chat discord system.
[*]This game uses the Unpaid Intern Central consolidated private chat system. Participants of this game will be granted access as appropriate.
[*][color=#FF0000]Red text[/color] is used for votecounts, warnings, and other announcements by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related text.
[*][color=#0000FF]Blue text[/color] is used for activity checks, confirm counts, and other non-essential posts by the moderators. 
[*][color=#00FF00]Green text[/color] is used for town flavor-related text.
[*][color=#9a00ff]Purple text[/color] is used for third-party flavor-related text.
[*]Custom shades of these colors may be used for aesthetic purposes. 
[*]Current custom shades are: Town flavor green v.2 ([b][color=#2be368]#2be368[/color][/b]) and Activity Check blue ([b][color=#005dff]#005dff[/color][/b]). For a full list of custom colors, [url=INSERT]click here[/url]. 
[*]The moderators may change the rules at any time. Major rule changes will be announced at the bottom of the OP. All changes will also be noted in the modlog and OCRSTM Version History. 
[*]Players will not be retroactively penalized for violating new rules. 
[*]Major changes to the OP may be made in between games. The most important changes will be noted in the OCRSTM Version History. 
[*]The moderators pledge to treat players fairly and keep moderator interventions to a minimum; however, we reserve the right to make the final judgement in the moderation of this game.[/list]

[b]MG251 OP is based on Overcomplicated Ruleset[sup]TM[/sup] (OCRSTM) 10.[/b]

No fancy PRs, no random mechanics, no Magic8Balls[sup]TM[/sup], no MicrowavablePotatoes[sup]TM[/sup], just 7 [color=#2be368][b]Vanilla Townies[/b][/color] and 2 [color=red][b]Mafia Goons[/b][/color]. Oh yeah, and lots of GreatFlavor[sup]TM[/sup] provided by Boss[sup]TM[/sup], as always.

post_rendered:
“Look here, there’s a brand called ‘I Can’t Believe It’s Not Butter!TM’” mathjayTM says, “If people are willing to pay for something that’s not ButterTM, think how much they’d pay for something that is ButterTM!”

“I’m pretty sure people are paying for it because they don’t want ButterTM,” replies BossTM.

“That can’t be right, who in their right mind wouldn’t want ButterTM? Our slogan can be ‘I Can Totally Believe It’s Butter!TM’ or ‘ICTBIBTM’ for short.”

“That slogan just sounds like you’re high on CopiumTM after getting ScammedTM into buying fake ButterTM.”

“I’m glad you like it,” mathjayTM nods, sounding quite pleased with himself.

“And the acronym sounds like an STD.”

“PerfectTM! Now that you’ve ApprovedTM our new slogan, it’s time to HireTM people for the ButterFactoryTM.”

“Why do we need a ButterFactoryTM if we’re just reselling the ButterTM that you bought?” BossTM asks.

“Because we need to ConvinceTM people that we ActuallyTM produced the ButterTM we’re selling! MadeAtUICTM, ExpirationDateTM was last year, lots of RandomChemicalsTM in the ingredients section, and all that good stuff that really assures our customers of the quality of the ButterTM, you know? Now, I’ve compiled a HiringListTM of all the people who applied for the job, take a look.”

mathjayTM slams a piece of paper on the desk with a list of names. BossTM reads the first few names and raises his RightEyebrowTM. That is NeverTM a GoodSignTM; in fact, it is decidedly a BadOmenTM. As BossTM continues reading, his eyes go wide. He looks terrified at the prospect of HiringTM any of the candidates on that list. BossTM begins to bang his head on the table as he sees the last few names.

“I don’t think we should HireTM any of these people! They all seem like the type of people to be GoodStudentsTM and get RespectableJobsTM at PaidInternCentralTM! They’d never be able to handle our PostModernTM ManagementStyleTM here at UnpaidInternCentralTM!” exclaims BossTM.

“That’s exactly what I was thinking. I’ll go let them know that they’re all HiredTM and tell them to report to work immediately,” declares mathjayTM as he rushes out of the office.

BossTM gapes like a fish as the door closes behind mathjayTM. He takes a long, hard look at that HiringListTM and sighs, SeriouslyTM considering writing a ResignationLetterTM.

A few hours later…

BossTM hears footsteps outside his office and braces himself for a DisasterTM as mathjayTM walks in with the ButterInternsTM.

“Reporting for duty,” drawls Osmium_TM unenthusiastically.

“Oh joy,” ad333TM continues, “Got FiredTM in ReaperWarsTM and now RehiredTM as a ButterInternTM for a stupid ButterFactoryTM. Absolutely amazing.”

“What about me?” asks HannahWTM furiously, “I was never even FiredTM! I DemandTM an ExplanationTM for my DemotionTM to a ButterInternTM!”

“Now now,” BossTM starts, “You didn’t get DemotedTM, you got PromotedTM to having a DoubleJobTM! It’s like a DoubleMajorTM in college but a lot less FunTM!”

“Oh, a DoubleJobTM? Do I get PaidTM twice as much?”

“Um, yeah! Two times ZeroTM is still ZeroTM though, heh, heh.”

HannahWTM rolls her eyes.

“Wait, what? We’re not getting PaidTM?” asks AvanaeTM.

“Of course not! This is UnpaidInternCentralTM! If you wanted to get PaidTM, you should’ve gone to PaidInternCentralTM!”

All the ButterInternsTM turn to stare at mathjayTM, who seems to be trying to sneak out of the room.

“Is something WrongTM?” inquires BossTM, ConfusedTM.

“NothingTM! NothingTM is WrongTM,” mathjayTM responds quickly, “I just remembered that MyCatIsOnFireTM! I’ll be RightBackTM!”

EulerNTMTM pulls a giant HoagieTM he bought from the UnpaidInternCafeteriaTM and slaps mathjayTM with it.

“Owie,” complains mathjayTM, “I told you that this job would make you RichTM! The RichTM was TrademarkedTM! It’s not my fault you guys didn’t catch onto the TrademarkTM at the end.”

“RichTM with PositivityTM and AltruismTM!” adds BossTM unhelpfully, “A FriendTM is worth more than all the UnpaidDollarsTM in the world!”

“Oh really?” questions HannahWTM, “I’ll give you money to FireTM mathjayTM.”

“BossTM would never FireTM me. I’m his FriendTM!”

“How much money?” asks BossTM, intrigued.

“Two UnpaidCentsTM.”

“DealTM, where’s the money?”

“WHAT!” mathjayTM looks scandalized as HannahWTM pulls out a piano from her pocket and plays a sad tune.

“Here it is,” says HannahWTM, pulling out some coins from her wallet and handing it to BossTM while continuing to play the piano with her feet.

“Okay, mathjayTM, after CarefulConsiderationTM, I’ve decided that you were too CompetentTM for the job. Please know that this decision was not made lightly. For the good of the company, your employment with UnpaidInternCentralTM is terminated, effective immediately.”

“NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!1!1!1!!1!1!111! BossTM, I PromiseTM I’ll become less CompetentTM, don’t FireTM me!”

“Don’t worry buddy, I’m RehiringTM you to be a ButterInternTM for the ButterFactoryTM!”

“Oooooh, that sounds good, what’s the job like?”

“It’s gonna make you RichTM!”

“Oh boy! I’m in!” exclaims mathjayTM excitedly.

“Okay, just sign here, here, here, here, here, here, here, here, here, here, here, and here.”

“Done.”

“That’s enough!” exclaims AvanaeTM, “If we’re not getting PaidTM-”

“Wait what? We’re not getting PaidTM?” asks mathjayTM, visibly ConfusedTM, “I thought BossTM said-”

“I had a TrademarkTM after RichTM.” BossTM clarifies as HannahWTM FacepalmsTM, “Anyway, now that all of our ButterInternsTM for the ButterFactoryTM are here, it’s time for your FirstDayTM of CruelAndUnusualTM labor!"

All the ButterInternsTM groan as they follow BossTM out of the office.

BossTM was scrolling through the latest UnpaidNewsTM when he saw ItTM. ItTM was so horrible that BossTM had three HeartAttacksTM and two StrokesTM at the same time when he found out. ItTM was so terrifying that BossTM had NightmaresTM for the rest of his life. ItTM was so grotesque that UnpaidInternCentralTM decided to CensorTM any descriptions of it from the public BusinessRecordsTM, to protect CustomersTM and UnpaidInternsTM from being traumatized for the rest of their lives, without any other UlteriorMotivesTM at all.

“We’re not getting PaidTM here at the ButterFactoryTM, so we’re going OnStrikeTM,” the message read, “We’re going to let all your CustomersTM know about how horribly you treat your UnpaidInternsTM!!!1!1!!1!11!”

BossTM gasped and immediately called for the entire ButterFactoryTM to be locked down. No one could get in or out without BossTM’s permission. He gathered all the ButterInternsTM together in the executive meeting room.

“I have an important announcement to make,” declares BossTM, “Today, I received this message from two AnonymousTM ButterInternsTM!”

He shows everyone the message from a HolographicProjectorTM in the room and hears a few shrieks of horror.

“How do you know it’s from a ButterInternTM?” asks mathjayTM, “ItTM could be from AnyoneTM!”

“Because despite the DeviousTM methods these ButterStrikersTM used to cover their tracks, they forgot one CrucialDetailTM! They signed the message with ‘Sincerely, Two AnonymousTM ButterInternsTM!’”

“Looking pretty SusTM right now, mathjayTM,” says EulerNTMTM accusingly, “Maybe HannahWTM was right! BossTM should’ve FiredTM you from the start!”

“Wha-?” replies mathjayTM, “You’re one to talk, you AbsoluteWhiteCrayonTM sold at UnpaidInternCentralTM for only $8430914890890809798765435435445.99 each!”

“You’re calling me an AbsoluteWhiteCrayonTM? Well I’ll have you know that you’re a JamesMonroeTM, fifth PresidentOfTheUnitedStatesTM, sold for less than $429758710958385310531.99 each!!”

“Wait, WHAT? I thought JamesMonroeTM was being sold for $143189740390138409137409138409138040157891.99! Is this a new DiscountTM?” says Osmium_TM, surprised, “I’m gonna go buy one now!”

“Now, now, calm down LadiesTM,” BossTM interrupts with an air of AuthorityTM, “It’s not a new DiscountTM. We just marked up the price and it resulted in integer overflow! But we do have an EmployeeDiscountTM of negative 30% off! You still want JamesMonroeTM?”

“Uh, sure?” replies Osmium_TM.

BossTM immediately walks out of the room. A few minutes later, he walks back in, dragging a screaming JamesMonroeTM over to OsmiumTM.

“Here you go, kind sir. I just sold your house, your car, and your entire family and it turns out that you still owe me a few gazillion UnpaidDollarsTM! I charge an interest rate of 43597318571098104029% so you’d better pay me back SoonTM. Alright then, anyway, as I was saying about the ButterStrikersTM, since I believe in DemocracyTM, I’m going to let you guys decide who to FireTM!”

“FireTM ad333TM,” says AvanaeTM, “He breathes too loudly! I can’t ConcentrateTM on my ProcrastinationTM with this guy around!”

“What!? This is clearly a ButterStrikerTM trying to deceive us all!” responds ad333TM indignantly, “I say we FireTM AvanaeTM as soon as possible!”

“:thonk:.” says HannahW, “We need to CalmDownTM and make a RationalDecisionTM.”

“CALM? I’M VERY CALM RIGHT NOW,” booms falliinqsnow-TM as she chucks her laptop across the room at BobDBuilder321TM, “AND I’LL BE EVEN CALMER WHEN WE GET THIS GUY OUT OF HERE! HE SMELLS LIKE HE HASN’T SHOWERED FOR THREE WEEKS!!!1!111!1!!!”

“OH MY GOD THERE’S A GiantRatTM IN HERE!” exclaims mathjayTM, “THOSE ARE OnSaleTM AT UnpaidInternCentralTM FOR ONLY $58275032985072398140.99 EACH! GET ME OUT! GET ME OUT!”

As the room descended into chaos, BossTM quietly pulled out a WaspNestTM from his pocket and tossed it at Scipio1TM, who was stung by dozens of bees before he managed to throw it away at someone else. Satisfied, BossTM snuck out of the room and closed the door, enjoying the sound of screams, flames, and shattering glass as he walked back to his office.

A few days later, BossTM decides to check on the ButterInternsTM. As he walks into the executive meeting room, he sees HannahW tied up and gagged in one corner of the room, while the other eight ButterInternsTM are furiously accusing each other of being the other ButterStrikerTM. They seem completely oblivious to BossTM’s presence.

“Ahem.”

“Oh thank god you’re here BossTM,” says Scipio1TM as he walks over to HannahW, taking the gag out, “We’ve decided that HannahW is clearly a ButterStrikerTM! She needs to be FiredTM ImmediatelyTM!”

“Don't try to cozy up to BossTM, we all know that you're his partner, the other ButterStrikerTM!” exclaims EulerNTMTM.

“WHAT? HOW COULD I BE THE OTHER ButterStrikerTM??!?!?!? I’VE BEEN TELLING YOU THAT THIS SCUMBAG’S THE ButterStrikerTM ALL ALONG!!!!11!1!11!!!1!1!”

“Pffffffft, that’s just ReversePsychologyTM.”

“But what if it’s ReverseReversePsychologyTM and she’s actually InnocentTM after all?” asks mathjayTM.

“BUT WHAT IF IT’S ReverseReverseReversePsychologyTM? Hadn’t thought about that, have you?”

“IT COULD ALSO BE ReverseReverseReverseReversePsychologyTM though!”

As they continue to argue, BossTM decides that it’s way too late in the evening to deal with these GullibleIdiotsTM. He decides to step out of the room to buy a coffee from the UnpaidCafeteriaTM, which is open 24/7TM and will serve all of your needs, from a simple cup of coffee to a PoisonedBeerTM that you can VanquishTM your CoworkersTM with! Go check it out, the prices aren’t ExpensiveTM, they're just accounting for FutureInflationTM!

Five minutes later…

Sipping the coffee and whistling a cheerful tune, BossTM heads back to the executive meeting room.

“...ReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReverseReversePsychologyTM!” mathjayTM points out.

“Okay guys, the WorkDayTM is over, go back to your rooms, you can continue discussing TomorrowTM!” says BossTM, shooing the ButterInternsTM out of the meeting room.

“Yay, time for RestTM!” exclaims ad333TM, who seems VeryTiredTM and is about to PassOutTM.

“Who said anything about RestTM?” asks BossTM, genuinely ConfusedTM, “There’s more work to do for OvertimeTM!”

“Are we getting PaidTM for this?” Scipio1TM inquires as everyone else groans.

“OF COURSE NOT! It’s UnpaidInternCentralTM!” responds AvanaeTM, “You’re looking kinda SusTM, Scipio1TM, demanding OvertimePayTM! I say we FireTM this guy tomorrow!”

“That’s enough! Go back to your rooms, everyone! HannahW, come with me,” orders BossTM.

Everyone shuffles out of the meeting room, while HannahW follows BossTM to an unfamiliar floor in UnpaidInternCentralTM HeadquartersTM.

Fifteen minutes later…

BossTM and HannahW reach the top of the stairwell, having just climbed 1347198579103841 flights of stairs. BossTM, whose body is in ImpeccableShapeTM, looks completely unfazed, while HannahW’s weak, wimpy body is completely worn out.

“Where are we going, BossTM?” asks HannahW as she pants from exhaustion.

“See, I told them that you were going to be FiredTM, but I LiedTM! You’re going to be PromotedTM!”

“WHAT! Really? WOW! What’s my new position?”

“You’re the new UnpaidManagerTM for the IndoorBungieJumpingTM facility,” replies BossTM, “No need to thank me, I know I’m an ExtremelyGenerousTM BossTM.”

“I know that you said there was no need to thank you, but I’ll do it anyway because I’m a SuckUpTM with NoPersonalityTM!”

Boss grits his teeth as he says, “Your office is that way.”

“Where? In the elevator with the sign saying ‘OutOfOrderTM’?”

“Yep, right in there.”

“Okey-dokey BossTM, see you tomorro- AHHHHHHHHhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh…”

HannahW has been FiredTM. She was a ButterStrikerTM (Mafia Goon).

“Annnnnnd my work here is DoneTM,” says BossTM, walking away with a look of satisfaction.

Good morning, ladies and gentlemen of the esteemed FrenchFrySocietyTM. Graciously accept all the applause.

I am here on behalf of UnpaidInternCentralTM to propose some changes to InternationalFrenchFryStandardsTM. Ignore AwkwardSilenceTM when no one knows what UnpaidInternCentralTM is.

First, I believe that CrunchinessTM ruins all foods Duck behind podium to prevent being hit with rotten tomatoes., and the FrenchFryTM is no exception. I recently conducted a survey of 2 people, myself included, and found that 100% of people hate CrunchyTM foods. Nod understandingly at everyone’s surprise. With a sample size this large, it is possible to generalize this conclusion to all LivingOrganismsTM in the UnobservableUniverseTM. Continue to nod as if you know what you’re talking about. And there you have it, the TruthTM that we’ve been searching for all along. No one likes CrunchyTM foods. Jab finger into the air to assert dominance.

Therefore, I propose that we enact a strict ban on all CrunchyTM FrenchFriesTM Shake fist in the air to continue establishing dominance., and instead make them RichTM and CreamyTM. Let them MeltTM in your mouth as soon as they touch your taste buds, preferably even earlier. This will help increase the popularity of the tasty yellow sticks dramatically, as everyone who was previously driven away by their CrunchinessTM will now come running at the sight of them. In fact, Use authoritative voice to show to convince the audience to buy into your BS. my CuttingEdgeTM mathematical models predict that these former FrenchFryHatersTM would be willing to sell all their property and become UnpaidInternsTM for the rest of their lives just to get a whiff of the scent of our new and improved FrenchFriesTM. Ignore horrified gasps at the prospect of being an UnpaidInternTM.

Second, I believe that FrenchFriesTM should be made with more FatTM. Look each member of the audience in the eye to intimidate them. The reason is simple: FatterTM foods make people want to eat more of it. Throw a golf ball at anyone that dares look confused. Yes, that's right, in another study I conducted this morning on 1 person, namely myself, I discovered that 100% of people love eating as much fat as possible. Graciously accept applause for such a scientific breakthrough. The TruthTM is, people just don't like carbohydrates.

So what should we do? Call on someone random from the audience to answer. Before they can say anything, yell: WRONG! We fix FrenchFriesTM by taking the PotatoesTM out of them! Ignore boos coming from the conservatives of the FrenchFrySocietyTM. Instead, let's make it by churning milk and cream and then refrigerating it into a rectangular prism shape, and then throw an ICBM into the audience BOOM! You get RichTM, CreamyTM, and extremely FattyTM FrenchFriesTM! Pull out confetti cannon and fire into the audience.

Actually, I have one more proposal for you today. You see, the name FrenchFryTM doesn't really roll off the tongue. It has the word FrenchTM in it, and no one really likes FrenchTM people. Catch rotten tomatoes and throw them back into the audience. That’ll teach ‘em. So if we got rid of that, we'd just have FryTM. Now that doesn't sound very good either. So instead, I propose a new, glorious name that just RollsOffTheTongueTM.

ButterTM. DramaticPauseTM for effect.

Also, just as a side announcement, Scipio1 has been FiredTM from UnpaidInternCentralTM. He was a ButterInternTM (Vanilla Townie). I don’t really remember writing that TerminationLetterTM but whatever, you know?

Thank you and have a terrible rest of your day. Get off the stage as quickly as possible to avoid the mob.


- Draft of BossTM’s speech to the FrenchFrySocietyTM

post_rendered:
Honestly, don't think me pushing mj was actually that bad, so I wanna talk about a few things.

a. Botched "mj 100% wolf" read at the end.

He was noodling, I spent quite a bit of the morning trying to figure out how he wasn't noodling and stalling his hang. I couldn't figure it out.

At the time of writing this post, I have realized my mistake. mj was noodling, he was stalling - just these behaviors don't necessarily come from a wolf, which was the whole premise of "mj 100% wolf".

I suppose I didn't really put myself in mj's POV, like, I know I don't like getting hanged as town unless it's absolutely required, and I failed to realize mj probably felt the same way.

That being said, after spending the morning continuously rereading that segment, I believe the behavior was definitely >rand w, though it was also definitely nowhere near "100% lock wolf".

Andddd after realizing my mistake, I don't actually feel too bad about getting it wrong given the circumstances in which I made the read and the relative lack of time I had to think it completely through, nor do I think it was a terrible mistake in the "omg you're so bad and can't stop tunneling" sense. (Hint: it wasn't a tunnel.)

b. Betting

This... was quite unfortunate for me, lol. Whoops.

The moral of the story is probably don't bet until you've thought everything over for quite a while.

@euler
euler is god
when he plays, we stand in awe
and sometimes when i am sad
i read his games and feel more bad
guys this is the story of my life
send help pls im in strife


c. "mj should die first"

I don't regret this sentiment one bit (except for the fact it led to the whole betting drama).

Frankly, I think, given the information that was there, this was the correct sentiment to have.

I'd read over mj's ISO multiple times that phase, and I simply couldn't clear him - not to mention that I found him mildly wolfy. I simply thought he should die first.

And, yeah, we could just do the whole "burn through the POE" thing, where it doesn't exactly matter who dies first, but I've already explained what I felt was wrong with this.

mj is a good wolf. mj is a pockety wolf. And, frankly, falliinq was all "no, mj's town" at that point and I'd read over mj's ISO multiple times and didn't find anything out of his wolf range - this led me to the conclusion falliinq was clearing him for the wrong reasons which got me worried about hanging Avanae first - if mj was scum then it would be possible to dig himself out of the POE simply by eliminating the right people.

The one mistake I think I made here was assuming falliinq was townreading mj for bad reasons, in hindsight, definitely should have waited for the towncase - you never know what you might miss (even with multiple readthroughs of ISOs).

I also think I was justified in exaggerating my mj wolfread, the specific time period was the bit before the bet drama, but not too early after SoD. If you ISO me you should know what I'm talking about; there's probably a distinct transition between "mj is kinda wolfy" and "mj is probably just a wolf", the purpose of which was to make it easier to get mj hanged.

And.... yeah.
The purpose of this really is to

a. sort out my thoughts on this whole mess
b. possibly reduce the ripping I'm probably going to get for a mistake that's as trivial as this

(where trivial means "bob didn't ruin the entire game by tunneling a player to death and refusing to re-evaluate", cuz like, no that's patently false.)

prolly will talk bout it later
